title: Exploring approaches to forecasting IP demand
body: "IP offices forecast the volume of IP right applications they expect to receive, to plan future resource requirements and revenues.    This paper explores forecasting methods used by IP offices and other organisations, based on desktop research and information directly requested by the IPO. This exercise was undertaken to investigate additional options for future forecasting at the IPO.   If you prefer to read this report in a PDF format, please choose the ‘Print this page’ button on the left side of the page and select the option to print to PDF.   "
